steps: Submit refund claim to BZSt for EUR 3,093.75 overpayment on Deutsche Bank AG dividends under DE-NO treaty reduced rate (26.375%)
Provide Deutsche Bank Custody statement showing 25% withholding vs. treaty-entitled 26.375% rate for 500,000 DBK shares
Reference DE-NO tax treaty Article 10 dividend provisions supporting lower withholding rate for Norwegian resident CLIENT08

references.title: BZSt – Capital Yield Tax Relief / Refund Procedures
